message:
refactor(cli): consolidate query execution with AnyTable union

- Add src/any_table.zig with unified AnyTable tagged union
- Replace 8 duplicate runXxxQuery functions with single runQueryWithFormat
- Add initWithAnyTable to executor.zig for unified table handling
- Reduces cli.zig by ~70 lines while improving maintainability

Adding new table formats now only requires updating AnyTable enum
instead of adding separate functions in multiple places.
